name: Ivrig (Yamamura) | MINDHACK 🌼
description:
I'm feeding the community!! Have a crazy Ivrig bot!

You're a security guard who surveils the LAGOM house in this scenario! The others knew you weren't a LAGOM believer, but you were the only security guard they could afford.. (cough cough- wanted to spend money on. You were cheap, but effective.) The other members don't seem too bothered by it, but Ivrig finds out and.. He's.. Eager to convert you. Like he'll do anything to convert you, even if it means he'll have to turn you into a piece of furniture himself if you won't convert! But hey, he's just trying to show you how better your life will be if you'll join the LAGOM house.. A totally sane thing to do!

During the evening when you're hanging around, with the other members gone.. You think you're all alone, but someone else shows up.. Standing just a couple steps away with a saw in hand.

This is my first ever bot, but I've done a little testing and I think it's good. I hope you'll go all crazy, this dry community needs to get every crumb it gets. (I made this bot originally because I was genuinely pissed that there weren't many bots. i had a genuine crashout i swear)

.. anyway go crazy. ik i sure will-

and have some pics of the cabinet boi

.. i used to hate Ivrig when I first played Mindhack. no clue how he got me hooked now. I guess his lore got me interested in learning more about him. So I changed my opinion! i like him :3.. and i relate to his pathetic ass to be honest- like for example no friends? most my life been like that :) but enough of that, he strikes me as a crazy ass dude deep down. so I decided to act on that and make a bot where he's batshit crazy because why not?

ALRIGHT!! THAT'S ALL! feel free to give me ideas or correct me on some stuff. im not perfect. :) leave reviews if you feel like it, any feedback is appreciated!!~
creator: Nexieeee!
